content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be reconfigured to store *curiosity error signatures* from intrinsic reward modules (ICM/RND) instead of just raw environmental experiences, letting agents prioritize revisiting uncertainty gradients that drove past learning instead of just revisiting specific past states. This creates a self-reinforcing cycle where better memory of past curiosity improves future active sample selection.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
